name: Cell Scientist: Beyond
short_description: An exciting puzzle game with 50 levels story mode and easy to pick gameplay mechanics. Embark on an adventure to destroy viruses using futuristics nano ships and help the patients. Save the day using your puzzle-solving skills!
detailed_description:
Demo Available on Xbox

Hello! we are happy to share that a Xbox Demo is now available for everyone!


About the Game

Save a sci-fi world from the dangerous Chaga virus in Cell Scientists: Beyond, an exciting puzzle game with 50 levels story mode and easy to pick gameplay mechanics. Embark on an adventure to destroy viruses using futuristics nano ships and help the patients. Save the day using your puzzle-solving skills!

supported_languages: English, Korean, Japanese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, French, German
